input.placeholder: Describe a bug, suggest an improvement, or ask a question.
input.reuseLocalRepo: Will reuse your local grex repo.
input.confirmPrompt: This will open an issue in {{slug}}. Confirm?

clone.forkReady: Fork ready. Choose where to clone it on your machine.
clone.forkIntro: We'll fork the upstream Grex repo into your GitHub account.
clone.forkFailed: Failed to fork grex on GitHub.
clone.folderPickerFailed: Unable to open the folder picker.

prompt.description: Tweak this if you want — it's what the agent starts with.

template.intro: I'm contributing to {{slug}}. Please help me ship this.
template.step1: 1. Explore the code, ask anything unclear, propose a minimal change.
template.step2: 2. Implement once I agree. Do not commit, push, or open a PR before I say "go ahead".
template.step3: 3. After my "go ahead": commit, push to origin, then `gh pr create --repo {{slug}} --base main` with a title and body generated from the diff.
template.replyInLanguage: Reply using the same language I used in the "## My feedback" section above.

toast.noModelMessage: Pick a default model in Settings first.
toast.sendToAgentFailedMessage: Failed to send feedback to agent.
